system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Medium or Heavy Melee Against Parry at -1d10
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You make a single, carefully aimed and timed blow that bites deeply into the flesh of your opponent. This Technique requires a bladed weapon. Make a Medium or Heavy Melee roll against the opponent’s Parry at a -1d10 penalty. On a Success, the Attack deals 1 Extra Wound plus maximum Damage (6d10), and for the purpose of determining Damage for this attack, subtract twice your Ranks in Waijia from the opponent’s Hardiness. On a Total Success, the Attack also inflicts an additional Extra Wound. Cathartic: The Damage becomes open. Additionally, when determining Damage for this Attack subtract three times your Waijia Rank from your opponent’s Hardiness. For instance, if you are Qi Rank 3, you have 2 Ranks in Waijia, and you are attacking a character with Hardiness of 7, her Hardiness is effectively 2 against this one attack only.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Medium or Heavy Melee Against Parry at -1d10
system.requirementNotes: This Technique requires a bladed weapon.
